# Daily Report — 2026-07-02

## Task Completed
Added `get_notification` tool — fetches a single outbound email notification record
from the `sysevent_email_log` table by sys_id. Companion to the existing
`list_notifications` tool. Returns delivery state, recipient address, subject,
source record, notification type, and any error details. Includes 404 and
empty-result guards; reference fields (target) normalised via `_format_notification`.
Registered in service_desk, system_administrator, catalog_builder, and full packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1975
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system-package advisories (setuptools CVE-2024-6345, urllib3
PYSEC-2026-141/142, wheel CVE-2026-24049). No new vulnerabilities introduced.

## Files Changed
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/notification_tools.py (GetNotificationParams + get_notification)
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py (export get_notification)
- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py (import + registry entry)
- config/tool_packages.yaml (added to 4 packages)
- tests/test_notification_tools.py (13 new tests)

## Next Up
Add `list_scheduled_jobs` tool (GET sysauto_script; filters for name/active/run_as)
